Video.summary: Stress is high at the shop and things don’t get any better when Mark finds out that Tony from Tony’s Mopar Parts has secretly flown out to check in on the progress of his 1970 Challenger. Knowing that the restoration hasn’t started, Mark does everything in his power to distract Tony while Cousin Dougie races to disassemble his car.
Video.title: Mopardy

Video.summary: Ride along with Kevin Byrd as he takes a pilgrimage to Plymouth with some of his Factory Five friends.
Video.title: Factory Five Tour

Video.summary: 1967 Camaro wiring issues get cleaned up.
Video.title: Wiring Demons

Video.summary: The Impala is back and ready to breath with a new Kinsler intake.
Video.title: The Inhaler

Video.summary: Bryan rips apart a brand new Buelle to give it the Fuller touch.
Video.title: The Fueller

Video.summary: Sam Memmolo is back to match wits with Kevin about the new 6.7 diesel Cummins.
Video.title: Sam’s New Cummins

Video.summary: Like many projects, this 1954 Chevy 3100 restoration has stalled. So, we’re going to help this owner pickup the pieces on this project by installing a new 350 engine, completely overhaul the front end, and bolt-on new bumpers. After were done, this truck will be ready to get wired and fired.
Video.title: Pick-Up the Pieces

Video.summary: Sometimes Bruno will do a favor for a fellow Race Car Driver friend. That’s why Top Fuel driver Clay Millican’s old Dodge Cummins is in the shop. Like everything Clay drives, this truck is tortured and has broke a few things. Matt and Bruno get to play pit today on Truck U.
Video.title: Billie Hop

Video.summary: Bruno and Matt have earned some vacation time, but before they get to take a break they need to finish work on the 2012 Toyota Tacoma 4wd. The guys transform a Toyota into a Expedition vehicle that can light up any path in its way.
Video.title: Off-Road Toyota

Video.summary: It’s time for the ultimate axle reconstructive surgery.We install brand new Dana 44 axles on a 2008 Jeep Jk 4 wheel drive.
Video.title: Trail Rocker

Video.summary: Matt and Bruno install a portable bedwood kit on a collector 1946 Ford Truck and we give the truck a mini restoration under the hood.
Video.title: Collector Truck

Video.summary: Don’t wait till your factory warranty is up to modify your truck. We’ll show you how to add power and personality while staying street legal.
Video.title: Warranty is Up

Video.summary: Matt and Bruno take a stock Ram and add bigger wheels and tires. A new grill and makes some new friends along the way.
Video.title: Friend Zone

Video.summary: If you’re not prepared to break off-road, you might as well not even play. We’ll show you what “must-have” parts you need to recover your off-road vehicle.
Video.title: Recovery Vehicle

Video.summary: First, a Jeep Rubicon gets a power convertible top and then our YJ project gets stripped down to the frame.
Video.title: It’s a Jeep Day!

Video.summary: After a Canyon is saved from the side of the road, Matt and Bruno find the fix in a new crate LS Engine.
Video.title: Road Rescue-LS Canyon

Video.summary: Our YJ Project starts going back together with an all new Jeep tub and body. A much needed leaf spring kit and other interior accessories.
Video.title: YJ Project part2

Video.summary: Our Canyon truck got a new LS engine, today we give the truck a brake upgrade, new lower stance and turn this into the ultimate sleeper.
Video.title: Grand Canyon

Video.summary: SEMA 2017 is fast approaching and the Graveyard Ghouls are working hard on Chris Jacob’s 1969 GTX and John Buck’s 1971 Challenger with a Hellcrate Hemi. But as pressure begins to mount, Mark questions if he’ll be able to keep his promised - and ultimately - is forced to make a difficult decision.
Video.title: A Buck Shorted

Video.summary: The Phoenix Cuda: A legendary Mopar which was incinerated and from the ashes, will be reborn at Graveyard Carz.
Video.title: The Phoenix 'Cuda

Video.summary: Graveyard Carz returns to conclude the epic builds of Chris Jacob’s 1968 GTX after it suffered a devastating fire, and the first of its kind 1970 Plymouth Superbird equipped with a Hellcat Crate Hemi.
Video.title: SEMA Has Eyes On A Hellbird

Image.alt: SEMA Has Eyes On A Hellbird
SEMA Has Eyes On A Hellbird
SEMA Has Eyes On A Hellbird

Video.summary: New Season, New Carz! With SEMA in their rear-view mirror, the ghouls begin the final assembly of a 1969 Plymouth GTX in Seafoam Turquoise. And when help comes up short-handed, Mark enlists what he likes to call his “Echo Bomber.”
Video.title: 68 GTX vs Echo Bomber

Video.summary: It’s the 100th Episode! Join Mark and Royal and watch the never-before-aired Pilot featuring some of the first Mopar restorations the original ghouls tackled over ten-years ago.
Video.title: Pilot Takes Flight

Video.summary: It’s a hectic day at the Graveyard. Dave jumps from car to car, installing and assembling what he can, Will struggles to keep focused on one project at a time, and Mark makes progress on his A100 build with the hopes of revealing at SEMA 2018!
Video.title: Surveying The Will To Work

Video.summary: Professional wrestler, actor, and former professional football player known for his time in the WWE and WCW as Goldberg returns to the Graveyard! This time, he brings the ghouls two brand new projects - one of which includes installing a brand-new 392 Crate Hemi in his modern Dodge Truck.
Video.title: What's Next?

Video.summary: The Ghouls say goodbye to the 1970 Superbird equipped with a Hellcat Crate Hemi by taking it out for one last drive. Then it’s all hands on deck to get the beautiful second-generation Plymouth GTX in Seafoam Turquoise finished in time for the owner to see it for the first time since his father drove it.
Video.title: Performance with a Touch of Luxury

Image.alt: Performance with a Touch of Luxury
Performance with a Touch of Luxury
Performance with a Touch of Luxury

Video.summary: With a Plymouth GTX finished, the ghoulz refocus their efforts on the 1969 Dodge Daytona. With the owner wanting a full restoration, Mark and the Ghouls begin the tedious disassembly. Because of the car’s pristine condition, they take extra effort to document and preserve as much as they can.
Video.title: Dissecting a Daytona

Video.summary: The unsung heroes of the body shop begin the restoration on one of the most requested renovations ever: a 1971 Dodge Demon. With several panels needing replacement, Mark and George show the intricate process of grafting an entire front-clip from another vehicle to replace the rusted and damaged original.
Video.title: Exorcize a Demon

Video.summary: Fuller dreams of a life in Surf City, California and finds a garage of Dream Cars along the way.
Video.title: Surf City

Video.summary: Sam goes inside the paint lab with Dupli-Color to find out what it takes to create a new kind of paint from start to finish
Video.title: Paint Shop Lab

Video.summary: Find out what goes into the electrical wiring on a new age Super Car….not as much as you might think.
Video.title: Super Wiring

Video.summary: Every muscle car should have the power to match its looks, so Bryan and Byrd add a monster overdrive transmission to a 1972 Chevelle.
Video.title: Monster Muscle

Video.summary: Kevin and Bryan bring out their 1977 CB550 motorcycle project. Kevin handles the electronics and Bryan custom fabricates the exhaust.
Video.title: Café Racer

Video.summary: Kevin and Bryan begin work on a custom 1930’s roadster. This is not your typical roadster renovation…it is a true custom build up that begins with fabricating the frame from scratch!
Video.title: Roadster Frame

Video.summary: Kevin and Bryan continue re-building our 67 Camaro by rebuilding the quadra-jet carburetor.
Video.title: Carb Re-Build

Video.summary: Bryan does some welding on a 66 Nova while Kevin takes a trip to the dyno to dial in the new EFI system for the small block engine.
Video.title: Nova Project

Video.summary: Bryan tightens the bumper on a 1969 Chevy Van and Kevin lights a fire with the wrong gauge wire.
Video.title: No Smoking

Video.summary: Bryan and Kevin put a stop to the shakes on a 2006 Nissan. Also find out what happened when a graffiti artist put his mark on our garage.
Video.title: Maintenance Show

Video.summary: Bryan and Kevin marry an engine transmission and work on patch panels for the Nova project.
Video.title: Transmission Components
